summary: Full-stack software engineer with 6 years of experience building and shipping production web applications for startups and small businesses. Built 15+ client projects using Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Vercel. Created RentTrack, a SaaS lease management platform for property managers that grew to 200 paying users before being acqui-hired by a competitor. Former software engineer at Opendoor working on property valuation tools. Comfortable owning the entire stack from database schema design to deployment pipelines.

experience.title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Shipped 15+ production web applications for startup clients using Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Vercel
Built RentTrack, a SaaS lease management and maintenance request tool for small landlords using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe — grew to 200 paying users
Negotiated acqui-hire of RentTrack by a competitor in 2024, integrating the codebase and transitioning users over a 3-month period
Designed database schemas, built REST APIs, implemented authentication (Supabase Auth, NextAuth), and managed deployments across Vercel and Railway
Scoped and delivered fixed-price client projects ranging from $5K to $40K, managing end-to-end client relationships

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built internal tools for the property valuation pipeline using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Developed automated comparable property analysis feature processing 50K+ listings daily
Participated in on-call rotation for production systems serving 15K+ monthly home offers
